name: Home overview dashboard unification across spending, budgets, and household activity
description: Rebuild the current lightweight home/overview page into the real top-level dashboard of the application. This is the broadest and highest-impact gap-closure feature because it needs to unify information that already exists across expenses, budgets, analytics, onboarding, and household management into one coherent first screen. The target outcome is a dashboard that helps users understand current financial state, take the next obvious action quickly, and navigate household context without hunting across separate pages. This work should stay intentionally integrative: reuse existing domain surfaces where possible, but raise the quality of the app's primary entry experience to match the maturity of the underlying feature set.
evidence: Created active ExecPlan `docs/exec-plans/plans/2026-05-08-feat-045-home-overview-dashboard-unification.md` on 2026-05-08. Scope locks feat-045 to frontend-first `/home` dashboard unification across existing household, budget, analytics, expense, and onboarding surfaces, with explicit stop-and-log gate before any additive backend summary contract.
